meta.title: Senior Fellow Gabriel Schoenfeld discusses Wikileaks on Fox and F
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Gabriel Schoenfeld joined Fox and Friends on December 10, 2010 to discuss Wikileaks and the Espionage Act.
